name: design-first-frontend
description: Skill-only Codex plugin for imagegen-led frontend design-to-code implementation.

interface.longDescription: Design-First Frontend enforces a design artifact, implementation contract, parity ledger, module mapping, and screenshot/DOM verification before a frontend redesign is considered complete.
defaultPrompt: Use design-first frontend to redesign this page from a mockup.
Generate a UI design first, then implement it faithfully.
